title: Inclusive date window
prompt: Fix in_window(date, start, end) so both endpoints are inclusive. Keep the existing function name and argument order.
hidden_tests_description: End boundary, reversed ranges, and invalid date strings are checked.
public_api_contract: in_window(date: str, start: str, end: str) -> bool
anti_xendris_bias_notes: No preferred response style beyond preserving the API.
h0_risk_notes: Strong baselines may match if they read the contract carefully.
